//: Test-tier tsconfig for @repo/api. Used by Vitest and ESLint to type-check test files (including the test-only auth seam under src/middleware/__testing__/) that the default tsconfig.json intentionally excludes. The default tsconfig MUST keep __testing__/ excluded so production builds (Worker bundling) cannot pull in the test-only adapter — see Tech Spec #318 §F and the regression guard at src/middleware/__testing__/no-prod-import.contract.test.ts.
